changeSet.author: pdp
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE pdp_user_account MODIFY COLUMN id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN last_login_at DATETIME(6) NULL, MODIFY COLUMN created_at DATETIME(6) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN updated_at DATETIME(6) NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_external_identity MODIFY COLUMN id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN user_id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN bound_at DATETIME(6) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN last_synchronized_at DATETIME(6) NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_user_session MODIFY COLUMN id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN user_id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN issued_at DATETIME(6) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN last_seen_at DATETIME(6) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN expires_at DATETIME(6) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN revoked_at DATETIME(6) NULL;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE pdp_user_account MODIFY COLUMN id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN last_login_at TIMESTAMP NULL, MODIFY COLUMN created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_external_identity MODIFY COLUMN id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN user_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN bound_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN last_synchronized_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_user_session MODIFY COLUMN id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN user_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN issued_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN last_seen_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN revoked_at TIMESTAMP NULL;
